ncs_standard_definition.description_short: A Crop Consultant provides expert advice on crop management, soil health, and pest control to farmers, ensuring optimal crop yields and sustainable agricultural practices.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: Crop Consultants work closely with farmers to assess soil conditions, recommend suitable crop varieties, and develop customized crop management plans. They stay updated on the latest agricultural research, technologies, and best practices to provide evidence-based advice.

first_stepper.description: High school students interested in agriculture can pursue a degree in agriculture or a related field.

choice_maker.description: Individuals with a generic degree can pursue a postgraduate degree in agriculture or a related field to transition into the role.

future_builder.description: Experienced agricultural professionals can advance to senior roles by developing expertise in specific areas, such as precision agriculture or crop breeding.

problem_solver_uturn.description: Individuals from unrelated fields can transition into crop consulting by acquiring relevant skills and experience.
portfolio_proof_required: Project Report on Crop Yield Improvement
